Package
Description
com.cellsimulation.model
Core simulation model: persons, grid, engine, and shared types.

    Methods in com.cellsimulation.model with parameters of type SimulationSettings
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Person.move(Grid grid, NeighborhoodStrategy neighborhood, SimulationSettings settings)
    Optionally relocates this person to a random free neighboring cell.
    void
    Person.spread(Grid grid, NeighborhoodStrategy neighborhood, SimulationSettings settings, int currentTick)
    Spreads the disease to susceptible neighbors using a case-contact model.
    void
    Person.update(SimulationSettings settings)
    Advances the disease for one tick.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    SimulationEngine(Grid grid, SimulationSettings settings, NeighborhoodStrategy neighborhood)
    Creates a new simulation engine wired to the given grid, settings and neighborhood strategy.
